name: Kids' Wave Printed Shower Liner Clear - Pillowfort™
description: Bring a clean look to your kid's bathroom with this Wave-Printed Shower Liner from Pillowfort™. This shower liner features a clear design with an allover wave pattern in white for fun, nautical style. Designed to keep the shower curtain dry, it features a grommet top for easy installation and can be spot cleaned or wiped clean as needed.
